title: ExplosionGlass
description: Realistic glass destruction for TNT explosions in Minecraft – configurable, dynamic, and immersive.
body:
# 🧨 ExplosionGlass — Make glass fragile again!

**ExplosionGlass** is a lightweight Minecraft Forge mod for 1.12.2 that makes glass blocks behave more realistically during explosions. Nearby blasts will shatter glass, including panes and stained types — just like in real life!

It’s fully configurable, localized, and works in both singleplayer and multiplayer.

[![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4052357f1341e8b25f2a82a60db825f82ab4e64a.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/explosionglass)
[![GitHub](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42bad645daf4235b5c050ed51afb7c44671f02b2.png)](https://github.com/JornyZipper/ExplosionGlassMod)
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5c1c8717c38148ee9ecf2ae700554e8f011ac0b.png)](https://discord.gg/49xFaMhQ)
---

## 🔧 Features

- 💥 **Breaks glass during explosions** (TNT, creepers, etc.)
- 📏 **Customizable radius** of glass breaking
- 👁️ **Line of Sight (LoS)** check — glass will only break if it’s visible to the explosion
- 🎁 **Optional glass item drop** — glass can drop as an item if enabled
- 📴 **Mod toggle option** — disable the mod via config without uninstalling
---

## ⚙️ Configuration

ExplosionGlass generates a config file (`config/explosionglass.cfg`) where you can customize behavior:

| Option | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `glassBreakRadius` | Radius (in blocks) in which glass is affected by explosions |
| `useLineOfSight` | Enable Line-of-Sight check (recommended for realism) |
| `glassDrops` | Enable drops for broken glass |
| `enabled` | Toggle the mod on/off |

---

## 🛠️ Requirements

- Minecraft **1.12.2**
- Forge **14.23.5.2864**

To install:
1. Install Forge.
2. Drop the mod `.jar` into your `mods/` folder.
3. Launch the game.

---

## 🌍 Client / Server

| Feature | Side required |
|---------|----------------|
| Explosion behavior | ✅ Client & Server |
| Config sync | ✅ Both sides (if modified) |
| Works in singleplayer | ✅ Yes |
| Works on servers | ✅ Yes (clients must have the mod installed if configs are changed) |

---

## ✅ Why ExplosionGlass?

- Adds immersion and challenge to survival gameplay
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Great for adventure maps, modern builds, or war-themed scenarios
- Fully configurable to fit any playstyle


## ❤️ Community

- Dopex Thanks for drawing the avatar for the mod.
